title: Marqeta Full Year 2023 Earnings: Revenues Beat Expectations
text: Marqeta 2023 Annual Earnings Results. Full Year 2023 Results. Revenue Performance: Marqeta reported net revenue of $676 million for the full 2023 fiscal year, representing an annual decrease of 10%. However, this decline was significantly impacted by a major contract change. The revenue decrease was primarily driven by the contract renewal with Cash App, which allowed for reduced pricing and resulted in a change to revenue presentation, with fees owed to Issuing Banks and Card Networks reducing reported revenue by $234 million and negatively impacting the growth rate by 31 percentage points. Processing Volume Growth: Total processing volume (TPV) increased by 34% year-over-year, from $166 billion in 2022 to $222 billion in 2023. Profitability: Gross profit was $330 million, representing an increase of 3% year-over-year. Summary: While reported net revenue declined by 10% due to the Cash App contract restructuring, Marqeta's underlying business showed strong growth with 34% TPV growth. The revenue decline was largely attributable to accounting presentation changes rather than fundamental business weakness.
